description: Numbered final producing configuration CSVs and hashes.
current_evidence: Absolute numbered paths in every run summary; compact current configs have different basenames/content.
searches_performed: Tracked files, all causal reachable history, fsck/dangling object scan, archive path search.
impact: Setting-exact rerun unavailable.
thesis_wording: Numbered producing config path recorded; local file missing.
next_action: Recover the exact numbered files from authorized archive/backup and hash them.

description: Producing stage commands.
current_evidence: Each run_summary.json contains exact argv arrays, CWD, return code, timestamps, status, and outputs.
searches_performed: Parsed all 12 run summaries.
impact: Execution command evidence is available, though inputs/config/version remain incomplete.
thesis_wording: Run summaries record stage commands and status fields.
next_action: Retain run summaries and link recovered configs if obtained.

description: Producing causal repository revision/uncommitted state.
current_evidence: No source revision field in archived run summary or manifest.
searches_performed: Archive metadata/log search; parent and causal history; fsck.
impact: Historical source state cannot be tied to outputs.
thesis_wording: Producing source versions remain unresolved.
next_action: Recover signed run manifest or producer revision record.

description: Split ID manifest and split-generation lineage.
current_evidence: Logs record predict_split=all, seed=2023, and split counts; no IDs or split pickle hash.
searches_performed: All predictive logs/summaries/exports; STraTS history; fsck.
impact: Export argument is known, out-of-sample membership not auditable.
thesis_wording: Export split argument is recorded; split manifest remains absent.
next_action: Recover split IDs/pickle hash and generation record.

description: Configured predictive seed.
current_evidence: Every archived predictive log records seed=2023.
searches_performed: Parsed all predictive logs.
impact: Seed is recorded but does not replace split IDs.
thesis_wording: Seed is log-recorded, not a complete split lineage.
next_action: Retain log hashes with any future split manifest.

description: Archived supervised checkpoint files and hashes.

impact: Checkpoint artifacts are available.
thesis_wording: Archived checkpoint presence is distinct from export linkage.
next_action: Retain hashes; recover explicit exporter linkage.

thesis_wording: Checkpoint-to-export mapping remains unverified.
next_action: Recover exporter manifest or signed command/output record.

description: Full producing shell commands.

impact: Arguments can be audited; exact shell invocation cannot be claimed.

current_evidence: No local producer-version record or primary method-source alignment.

impact: Exploratory status remains required.
thesis_wording: CausalPFN source/version remains unresolved.

description: Exact prompt execution and proposal-to-code lineage: product/model/version, system instructions, reasoning/research mode, decoding settings, full turns, run identifiers, export procedure, and accepted/rejected output mapping.
current_evidence: Final prompt text and 2026-05-01 browser-export PDFs are hashable; ChatGPT 5.4 with extended reasoning is user-reported; active tagger/graph source broadly aligns with output schemas, but exact settings and acceptance mapping are absent.
searches_performed: Non-sensitive prompt/document/PDF-metadata/source/log/history search and high-level prompt-output-to-code comparison.
impact: The substantive LLM-assisted design method is evidenced, but it cannot be reproduced exactly or tied decision-by-decision to encoded rules and graph edges.
thesis_wording: State the LLM-assisted design-time role; mark model metadata as user-reported and proposal-to-code traceability as partial.
next_action: Archive a prompt/model/settings/full-output manifest and a reviewed decision table mapping each accepted, modified, or rejected proposal to source lines.

description: Human selection, modification, and clinical/causal review decisions for LLM proposals.
current_evidence: Management summaries and internal documents exist, but no verified reviewer identity, qualifications, item-level rationale, acceptance status, or decision date was recovered.
searches_performed: Repository prompt/document/log/history search; source comparison without inferring undocumented approval.
impact: Human-in-the-loop selection may be described only at project level; clinical approval and unchanged adoption cannot be claimed.
thesis_wording: Accepted designs were project-selected and source-encoded; exact human/clinical review remains unresolved.
next_action: Obtain a signed or advisor-approved review record identifying reviewers, criteria, decisions, modifications, and dates.

artifact_or_run: rule-derived proxy labels and project-encoded DAGs
description: Independent chart review or external validation of proxy-state construct validity, threshold rules, and clinically relevant graph structure.
current_evidence: Tagger diagnostics, prevalence/association tables, prompt artifacts, and source code exist; none is chart-adjudicated validation or independent clinical confirmation of the DAG.
searches_performed: Prompt/source/result inventory and terminology/claim audit; no patient data or restricted chart records accessed.
impact: Proxy labels must remain clinically inspired weak labels and DAG validity must remain assumption-bound.
thesis_wording: No chart-adjudicated clinical validation was established for the proxy labels or project-encoded DAGs.
next_action: Design an authorized blinded chart-review/external-validation protocol with agreement, calibration, and graph-review criteria.

description: Prompt/model sensitivity and independent replication of ontology, rule, and DAG proposals.
current_evidence: Older and final prompt exports show prompt-version history, but no controlled multi-model, multi-seed, paraphrase, ablation, or independent-expert comparison was recovered.
searches_performed: Prompt-version inventory and PDF/source comparison; no new LLM runs performed.
impact: Stability of the elicited design to model and prompt choices is unknown.
thesis_wording: The archived sessions document one design process, not robustness across LLMs, prompt variants, or independent experts.
next_action: Pre-register and execute a non-clinical robustness study comparing prompt variants, model versions, structured outputs, expert ratings, and proposal-to-code stability.
